    1. close(MemorySegment)

Interface NativeHandle.ThrowingCloser

Enclosing class:
NativeHandle
Functional Interface:
This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.
@FunctionalInterface public static interface NativeHandle.ThrowingCloser
A consumer that accepts a MemorySegment and may throw.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    close(MemorySegment handle)
    Performs the close operation on the given handle.

  • Method Details

    • close

      void close(MemorySegment handle) throws Throwable
      Performs the close operation on the given handle.
      Parameters:
      handle - the native handle to close
      Throws:
      Throwable - if the close operation fails
